result.stdout:
Azure Storage Queues Monitor: Utility to monitor Azure Storage Queues

Usage: azqmon [options]

Options:
  -?                                                          Show help
                                                              information
  -t|--title <Title>                                          Optional. A title
                                                              to be shown on the
                                                              console window.
                                                              Useful to
                                                              differentiate
                                                              environments or
                                                              when using
                                                              multiple
                                                              instances.
  -cs|--connectionstring <Connection String>                  Required, but can
                                                              be omitted if
                                                              supplied in
                                                              configuration
                                                              file. The Azure
                                                              Storage connection
                                                              string, in which
                                                              the queues will be
                                                              monitored.
  -i|--pollinginterval <ms>                                   Optional. The
                                                              interval between
                                                              the pollings of
                                                              the queues, in
                                                              milliseconds.
                                                              Defaults to 2000
                                                              milliseconds if
                                                              ommited.
  -c|--config <Json config path>                              Optional. Json
                                                              configuration file
                                                              containing the
                                                              Title,
                                                              ConnectionString
                                                              and
                                                              PollingInterval
                                                              options. If this
                                                              option is
                                                              supplied, all
                                                              other options are
                                                              ignored.
  -e|--showEmptyQueues <Show empty queues>                    Optional.
                                                              Indicates if empty
                                                              queues must be
                                                              shown. If not
                                                              specified, only
                                                              non-empty queues
                                                              will be shown
                                                              after the refresh.
  -s|--orderByQueueSize <Order queues by size, then by name>  Optional.
                                                              Indicates if the
                                                              queues must be
                                                              ordered by size,
                                                              then by name. If
                                                              not specified, the
                                                              queues will be
                                                              ordered by name
                                                              only.
  -x|--exportCountData <Export count data.>                   Optional.
                                                              Indicates if the
                                                              queues counting
                                                              must be exported
                                                              over time. This is
                                                              useful for
                                                              plotting graphs os
                                                              historical
                                                              analysis.
  -p|--exportFolderPath <Export folder path.>                 Optional.
                                                              Indicates the
                                                              folder path for
                                                              count data
                                                              exporting. If not
                                                              specified, the
                                                              current user
                                                              documents folder
                                                              shall be used. The
                                                              file name pattern
                                                              is
                                                              'azqmon_YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.csv.
  --ignore <Queue name to ignore.>                            Optional.
                                                              Indicates a queue
                                                              name pattern
                                                              (regex) to ignore.
  --important <Important queue name.>                         Optional.
                                                              Indicates a queue
                                                              name pattern
                                                              (regex) to
                                                              consider as
                                                              important.
                                                              Important queues
                                                              are emphasized in
                                                              exhibition.

commands.payload:
Azure Storage Queues Monitor: Utility to monitor Azure Storage Queues

Usage: azqmon [options]

Options:
  -?                                                          Show help
                                                              information
  -t|--title <Title>                                          Optional. A title
                                                              to be shown on the
                                                              console window.
                                                              Useful to
                                                              differentiate
                                                              environments or
                                                              when using
                                                              multiple
                                                              instances.
  -cs|--connectionstring <Connection String>                  Required, but can
                                                              be omitted if
                                                              supplied in
                                                              configuration
                                                              file. The Azure
                                                              Storage connection
                                                              string, in which
                                                              the queues will be
                                                              monitored.
  -i|--pollinginterval <ms>                                   Optional. The
                                                              interval between
                                                              the pollings of
                                                              the queues, in
                                                              milliseconds.
                                                              Defaults to 2000
                                                              milliseconds if
                                                              ommited.
  -c|--config <Json config path>                              Optional. Json
                                                              configuration file
                                                              containing the
                                                              Title,
                                                              ConnectionString
                                                              and
                                                              PollingInterval
                                                              options. If this
                                                              option is
                                                              supplied, all
                                                              other options are
                                                              ignored.
  -e|--showEmptyQueues <Show empty queues>                    Optional.
                                                              Indicates if empty
                                                              queues must be
                                                              shown. If not
                                                              specified, only
                                                              non-empty queues
                                                              will be shown
                                                              after the refresh.
  -s|--orderByQueueSize <Order queues by size, then by name>  Optional.
                                                              Indicates if the
                                                              queues must be
                                                              ordered by size,
                                                              then by name. If
                                                              not specified, the
                                                              queues will be
                                                              ordered by name
                                                              only.
  -x|--exportCountData <Export count data.>                   Optional.
                                                              Indicates if the
                                                              queues counting
                                                              must be exported
                                                              over time. This is
                                                              useful for
                                                              plotting graphs os
                                                              historical
                                                              analysis.
  -p|--exportFolderPath <Export folder path.>                 Optional.
                                                              Indicates the
                                                              folder path for
                                                              count data
                                                              exporting. If not
                                                              specified, the
                                                              current user
                                                              documents folder
                                                              shall be used. The
                                                              file name pattern
                                                              is
                                                              'azqmon_YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.csv.
  --ignore <Queue name to ignore.>                            Optional.
                                                              Indicates a queue
                                                              name pattern
                                                              (regex) to ignore.
  --important <Important queue name.>                         Optional.
                                                              Indicates a queue
                                                              name pattern
                                                              (regex) to
                                                              consider as
                                                              important.
                                                              Important queues
                                                              are emphasized in
                                                              exhibition.

staticCommands.description: Azure Storage Queues Monitor: Utility to monitor Azure Storage Queues

options.description: Optional. Json configuration file containing the Title, ConnectionString and PollingInterval options. If this option is supplied, all other options are ignored.
Required, but can be omitted if supplied in configuration file. The Azure Storage connection string, in which the queues will be monitored.
Optional. Indicates if the queues counting must be exported over time. This is useful for plotting graphs os historical analysis.
Optional. Indicates the folder path for count data exporting. If not specified, the current user documents folder shall be used. The file name pattern is 'azqmon_YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.csv.
Optional. Indicates a queue name pattern (regex) to ignore.
Optional. Indicates a queue name pattern (regex) to consider as important. Important queues are emphasized in exhibition.
Optional. Indicates if the queues must be ordered by size, then by name. If not specified, the queues will be ordered by name only.
Optional. The interval between the pollings of the queues, in milliseconds. Defaults to 2000 milliseconds if ommited.
Optional. Indicates if empty queues must be shown. If not specified, only non-empty queues will be shown after the refresh.
Optional. A title to be shown on the console window. Useful to differentiate environments or when using multiple instances.
